title: Plain-language source descriptions for ≥3 openly-licensed exemplar objects
context: The project must prove its end-to-end pipeline on openly-licensed exemplar objects before partner adoption. The defining constraint is 'never invent an object': every factual claim in a description must trace to a sourced, attributed catalogue fact. Descriptions are label-sized (≈40-120 words) and meet the plain-language reading-level target. This task is blocked until license-000 passes for all chosen objects, and depends on schema-001, rights-001, guide-001, and guide-002 being in place.
objective: Write plain-language source descriptions for ≥3 openly-licensed exemplar objects, each description: written strictly from sourced facts (every claim maps to a sourceRef in the object.yaml); label-sized (≈40-120 words); meeting the configured readability target (or carrying reviewer attestation); preserving proper nouns/dates/materials; neutral on any contested point; and accompanied by a completed review.yaml with agent uncertainty flags captured, resolved, or escalated before reviewer sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥3 exemplar objects selected from openly-licensed/PD sources, each passing the license-000 prerequisite (facts licensable, credit line confirmed, image decision made)
Each description is written strictly from sourced facts — every factual claim maps to a sourceRef in the object.yaml; no invented content

Each description is label-sized (≈40-120 words), meets the plain-language reading-level target per guide-001 (or carries reviewer plain-language attestation), and preserves proper nouns/dates/materials/period terms
Each description is neutral on any contested point; any contested fact is noted with attribution or omitted per guide-002
Sensitivity/contestation triage run on each object per guide-002; any sensitive-heritage or contested-legal object is escalated or excluded — not silently written
All agent UNCERTAIN flags captured in review.yaml as agentFlags; no sign-off recorded while any flag is unresolved; unresolved grounding flags result in claim removal
Domain-aware reviewer sign-off recorded in the PR (reviewer independent of drafting, COI declared); per-object license, attribution/credit line, and provenance present and verified
resources: Wikimedia Commons / Wikidata GLAM open data (candidate exemplar sources)
output: objects/<objectId>/descriptions/<lang>.md for ≥3 objects; objects/<objectId>/object.yaml; objects/<objectId>/review.yaml; objects/<objectId>/attribution.txt; objects/<objectId>/provenance.yaml
